--- 
title: "Quantitative Community Ecology in R"
author: "Matthew Aiello-Lammens and many others"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
site: bookdown::bookdown_site
output: bookdown::gitbook
documentclass: book
bibliography: [book.bib, packages.bib]
biblio-style: apalike
link-citations: yes
github-repo: rstudio/bookdown-demo
description: "This is a site for materials taught in a workshop on quantitative community ecology in R affaliated with the ESA Vegetation section."
---

# Prerequisites

We'll note the various R packages needed for the workshop here.

* vegan
* ade4
* ggplot2 and tidyverse packages

```{r include=FALSE}
# automatically create a bib database for R packages
knitr::write_bib(c(
  .packages(), 'bookdown', 'knitr', 'rmarkdown'
), 'packages.bib')
```
